31. eastern_wild_turkey = tom | osceola_wild_turkey = tom | goulds_wild_turkey = tom | merriams_wild_turkey = tom | rio_grande_wild_turkey = tom [forward subsumption resolution 29,30]
32. osceola_wild_turkey = tom | goulds_wild_turkey = tom | merriams_wild_turkey = tom | rio_grande_wild_turkey = tom [forward subsumption resolution 31,24]
